body:
FUNCTION-POOL slog        NO STANDARD PAGE HEADING
                          LINE-SIZE 152.

TYPE-POOLS: trlog, sabc.

* global types
TYPES: BEGIN OF gty_stack_killer,
         ok(1) TYPE c,
         trkorr TYPE trkorr,
         method TYPE ob_method,
         methodname TYPE rs38l_fnam,
       END OF gty_stack_killer.

*----miscancellous constants--------------------------------------------
CONSTANTS: gc_translate_sep(2)   VALUE '"''',
           gc_any_filler(2)      VALUE '&$',
           filler(1)             VALUE '&',
           var_border(1)         VALUE '"',
           gc_default_language   LIKE t100-sprsl VALUE 'E',
           true                  VALUE 'X',
           false                 VALUE ' ',
           true_false(2)         VALUE ' X',
           lev1_chars(1)         VALUE '#',
           level_bad_entry(1)    TYPE n VALUE 3,
           gc_max_disp_len       TYPE i VALUE 131,
           gc_word_separator     TYPE string VALUE ' -',
           gc_notfound_text(30)
                             VALUE 'Unknown message with & & & &'."#EC *

*& set file size to  read in compact mode (for large files).
*& In the future the value maybe raised.
CONSTANTS: gv_filesize_large  LIKE epsf-epsfilsiz VALUE if_cts_log_constants=>co_filesize_large. " 50000000

*------return codes-----------------------------------------------------
CONSTANTS: abort_rc      LIKE sprot-severity  VALUE 'A',
           err_rc        LIKE sprot-severity  VALUE 'E',
           postupg_rc    LIKE sprot-severity  VALUE 'P',
           warn_rc       LIKE sprot-severity  VALUE 'W',
           ok_rc         LIKE sprot-severity  VALUE ' ',
           all_rc(5)                          VALUE ' WPEA',
           gc_ok_rc_alternatives(2)           VALUE 'IS'.



*------log levels-------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANTS: abort_level   LIKE sprot-level     VALUE  1,
           err_level     LIKE sprot-level     VALUE  2,
           postupg_level LIKE sprot-level     VALUE  2,
           low_level     LIKE sprot-level     VALUE  4,
           all_level(9)                       VALUE '123456789',
           gc_min_level  LIKE trlog-level     VALUE '1',
           gc_max_level  LIKE trlog-level     VALUE '9'.

* memory IDs
CONSTANTS: gc_mem_id_stack_killer(30)
              VALUE 'sCTS_stacK_kIlleR_mETh'.               "#EC NOTEXT

*--------special messages-----------------------------------------------
* Exit code message by tp
CONSTANTS: tp_rc_ag       LIKE sprot-ag    VALUE 'TP',
           tp_rc_msgnr    LIKE sprot-msgnr VALUE '111'.

types: begin of error_pos,
         line type i,
         page type i,
       end of error_pos.


*---------various variables---------------------------------------------
DATA: gv_check_levels            VALUE ' ',
      gv_error_occured           LIKE sprot-severity  VALUE ' ',
      gv_mem_file                LIKE sprot_i-prot    VALUE ' ',

      gv_mem_id_error_occured(9) VALUE 'prot_errf',
      gv_mem_id_check_levels(9)  VALUE 'prot_chkl',
      gv_mem_id(9)               VALUE 'prot_file',

      gc_master_lang1            LIKE  t100-sprsl   VALUE 'E',
      gc_master_lang2            LIKE  t100-sprsl   VALUE 'D',
      gv_language                LIKE  sy-langu,
      gv_titlebar                LIKE  sy-title,
      gv_heading1(100)           TYPE  c,
      gv_heading2(100)           TYPE  c,
      gv_refresh                 TYPE  c,
      gs_line                    LIKE  trlog,    "hide variable
      gv_with_long_text_icon     TYPE  c,
      dv_with_long_text_icon     TYPE  c,
      gv_with_line_numbers       TYPE  c,
      dv_with_line_numbers       TYPE  c,
      gv_with_message_numbers    TYPE  c,
      dv_with_message_numbers    TYPE  c,
      gv_with_level              TYPE  c,
      dv_with_level              TYPE  c,
      gv_with_refresh_icon       TYPE  c,
      gv_gui_status              TYPE  gui_status,
      gv_user_canceled           TYPE  c,
      gv_user_wants_display      TYPE  c,
      gv_dirtype                 TYPE  dirtype,
      dv_fcode                   LIKE  sy-ucomm.

DATA: gt_lines                   LIKE  trlog      OCCURS 0.
DATA: error_index                TYPE  error_pos  OCCURS 0.
DATA: error_counter              TYPE  i      VALUE 0.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ts_log,
         logname TYPE ddprs-protname,
         ddprs   TYPE ddprs OCCURS 0,
       END OF ts_log.
DATA: gt_logs TYPE TABLE OF ts_log.

DATA: gs_refresh_parameters     TYPE trlog_refresh_parameters,
      gv_first_time             TYPE c      VALUE 'X'.

*--- TRINT_PUT_VARS_INTO_LINE -----------------------------------------*
* table for message variables; it is a global table since
* creation of internal tables is expensive
DATA:   BEGIN OF gt_var OCCURS 4,
          v      LIKE sprot_u-var1,
          used(1),
        END OF gt_var.
DATA:   gv_gt_var_filled(1) VALUE ' '. "mark that GT_VAR has 4 entries

DATA:  BEGIN OF gt_t100 OCCURS 0.
        INCLUDE STRUCTURE t100.
DATA:    real_langu      LIKE t100-sprsl,
         not_found       LIKE sprot_i-xfeld,
       END   OF gt_t100 .
*----------------------------------------------------------------------*


************************************************************************
*  M A C R O S                                                         *
************************************************************************
DEFINE current_message_raising.
  message id     sy-msgid
          type   sy-msgty
          number sy-msgno
          with   sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4
          raising  &1.
END-OF-DEFINITION.
